goal: Stop Alex's hobby URDF joints from wiggling/jittering on Play with a one-knob fix, no PD-controller math.
thoughts: Hobby URDFs rarely author joint stiffness/damping. Default import gives a stiff position drive with zero damping — pure oscillator. One knob: bump stiffness to ~10000, damping to ~1000. No math in the response. If still wobbly, raise damping further (2000) before touching velocity limits.
code:
# One knob.

# 1. Find the articulation
scene_summary(stage_path="<CURRENT_STAGE>")

# 2. Give every joint a sane drive (hobby URDFs never have this authored)
set_drive_gains(
    articulation_prim="/World/MyArm",
    stiffness=10000,
    damping=1000
)

# Hit Play. If still wobbly, bump damping to 2000.
failure_modes: Explaining the PD-controller math — Alex is out
Sending a 20-line walkthrough when one tool call + two numbers is enough
Mentioning max_joint_velocity before trying damping first
